title: Primary entity identifier

tooling_attempts.adjudication: errant external identity-check attempt; no output used for review and no repo or product-state write occurred

review_execution.permission_denial_disposition: denied errant external identity-check attempt; substantive review proceeded from provided diff and validation summary only

review_summary_text: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with no blocking P0/P1/P2 findings. It confirmed S02 implements only fixture_set_id primary identifier policy, preserves no-real-data/no-write boundaries, keeps tenant scope deferred to RP00.P01.M06.S03, and does not close RP00.P01 or RP00. It recorded three P3 notes: additive fixture_set_id on the S01 layout fixture record for cross-linking, a request to confirm disposition-status validation after evidence lands, and a note that non-reusable uniqueness is declared rather than runtime-enforced, which is appropriate for this single synthetic fixture set slice.

findings.title: S02 stamps fixture_set_id onto the S01 layout fixture sub-record
findings.details: Claude noted the fixture_set_id field is added to the existing layout fixture record as additive cross-linking required by layout_record_identifier_matches and matches_layout_record.
findings.recommendation: Track as slice-isolation note; no code change required because S01 remains layout-only in substance and keeps next_subphase RP00.P01.M06.S02.

findings.title: Confirm disposition-status validator interaction after evidence lands
findings.details: Claude could not independently execute the suite and recommended confirming RP00 validator stays green after closeout evidence is created.
findings.recommendation: Run final validation matrix after evidence creation.

findings.title: Non-reusable uniqueness is declared, not runtime-enforced
findings.details: Claude noted uniquenessPolicy declares stability/non-reuse without a runtime uniqueness registry.
findings.recommendation: No action needed at this slice granularity because this subphase has one synthetic fixture set and executable scope is canonical form enforcement.
